hero.title:
Maintenance technology
Consulting and
Training service
hero.description: Patineer Co., Ltd. provides maintenance services for machinery in the industrial sector. Founded in 2014, the company was established to meet the industry's need to prevent machine breakdowns whose root causes could not be identified, leading to lost production opportunities. Patineer therefore offers consulting on Condition Based Maintenance technology, used to inspect machine condition and maximize the benefits of maintenance management.

services.consultDesc: Our team of experts provides consulting on planning and developing maintenance systems and proactive maintenance programs, helping to improve efficiency and reduce maintenance costs in industrial plants.
services.serviceDesc: We provide measurement and analysis of machine condition using modern technology and vibration analysis, to prevent damage and extend the service life of equipment in the plant.
services.trainingDesc: We focus on delivering high-quality training to develop skills and knowledge in vibration analysis, machine condition monitoring, and predictive maintenance, in line with international standards.

vi.title:
Official Training and Certification
Representative of the Vibration Institute
vi.description: Patineer Co., Ltd. is the officially authorized representative of the Vibration Institute (USA) in Thailand, offering professional training and certification programs in vibration analysis.

about.title: About us
about.subtitle: We are experts in industrial machinery
about.description: With over 10 years of experience providing high-quality industrial machinery maintenance services, we help organizations carry out various types of maintenance processes to keep industrial machinery running and continuously improve production efficiency.
about.feature1: Inspect and analyze machine condition using modern technology
about.feature2: Train plant personnel to maintain and plan maintenance work efficiently
about.feature3: Develop maintenance approaches suited to each industry

clients.title: Our Clients
clients.subtitle: We are proud to have served leading clients across a wide range of industries. Our clients matter to us and are part of our growth. We are committed to delivering excellent service to everyone.
